prompt: Create a square 1:1 profile picture using the uploaded image as the exact reference for the pose, composition, and pixel art style. Recreate the subject as detailed retro pixel art with large, clearly visible pixels, crisp stepped edges, bold dark outlines, dramatic pixelated shading, vibrant colors, and the sharp look of a classic 16-bit/32-bit arcade sprite. Use only a solid Pantone 354C green background (#00B140). Do not include gradients, textures, text, logos, extra objects, or any photorealistic elements. Keep the raised glove, facial features, framing, and overall style exactly the same as in the reference image.
